label.name: Name
label.intervalTip: (0 = Polling Disabled. Use 'get' payload in Read node)
label.templateTip: Not sure? Use an MCZ Debug node to inspect live positions and identify your model.

template.aria_comfort: Aria Comfort Air — Air stove with multi-zone ducted fans
template.musa_hydro: Musa Hydro — Hydro stove with 3-way valve + pump (Musa, Club, Suite)

mcz-config.help:
Configuration node representing a single MCZ pellet stove connection. Create one per physical stove.

Connection

  • Server: MCZ cloud URL (default: http://app.mcz.it:9000) or local IP/port.
  • Serial Number: The 13-digit serial number printed on the stove label.
  • MAC Address: The MAC address of the stove WiFi module (no colons, e.g. 4A3FDAA538CD).
  • Interval (s): Auto-polling frequency in seconds. Set to 0 to disable and use manual get trigger instead.

Template

Choose the parsing template that matches your stove model:

  • Aria: Standard air stoves with a single ambient fan.
  • Aria Comfort Air: Air stoves with multi-zone ducted fans.
  • Idro: Hydro stoves with puffer or boiler (no 3-way valve).
  • Musa Hydro: Hydro stoves with 3-way valve and internal pump (Musa, Club, Suite).
  • Custom JSON: Provide your own field mapping. Use the MCZ Debug node to identify unknown positions.
